name: DW · Fact Sales Order Line
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS sales_order_line_id,
    ((gs - 1) / 3) + 1                                                          AS sales_order_id,    -- FK, 3 lines/order
    ((gs - 1) % 3) + 1                                                          AS line_number,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOLPROD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 200)    AS product_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOLQTY'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 20)      AS quantity,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('SOLPRICE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 50000)/100.0 + 10)::numeric, 2) AS unit_price,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('SOLDISC'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 30))::numeric / 100.0, 2)        AS discount_pct
FROM generate_series(1, 15000) AS gs
